(`m`.`KOTEI_SEQ_NBR` = 1) then concat(`n`.`KOTEI_NAME`,' [',if((coalesce(`st`.`KANRYO_FLAG`,0) = 1),'済','未'),']') end)),'-') AS `工程1名・進捗`,coalesce(max((case when (`m`.`KOTEI_SEQ_NBR` = 2) then concat(`n`.`KOTEI_NAME`,' [',if((coalesce(`st`.`KANRYO_FLAG`,0) = 1),'済','未'),']') end)),'-') AS `工程2名・進捗`,coalesce(max((case when (`m`.`KOTEI_SEQ_NBR` = 3) then concat(`n`.`KOTEI_NAME`,' [',if((coalesce(`st`.`KANRYO_FLAG`,0) = 1),'済','未'),']') end)),'-') AS `工程3名・進捗`,coalesce(max((case when (`m`.`KOTEI_SEQ_NBR` = 4) then concat(`n`.`KOTEI_NAME`,' [',if((coalesce(`st`.`KANRYO_FLAG`,0) = 1),'済','未'),']') end)),'-') AS `工程4名・進捗`,coalesce(max((case when (`m`.`KOTEI_SEQ_NBR` = 5) then concat(`n`.`KOTEI_NAME`,' [',if((coalesce(`st`.`KANRYO_FLAG`,0) = 1),'済','未'),']') end)),'-') AS `工程5名・進捗`,coalesce(max((case when (`m`.`KOTEI_SEQ_NBR` = 6) then concat(`n`.`KOTEI_NAME`,' [',if((coalesce(`st`.`KANRYO_FLAG`,0) = 1),'済','未'),']') end)),'-') AS `工程6名・進捗`,coalesce(max((case when (`m`.`KOTEI_SEQ_NBR` = 7) then concat(`n`.`KOTEI_NAME`,' [',if((coalesce(`st`.`KANRYO_FLAG`,0) = 1),'済','未'),']') end)),'-') AS `工程7名・進捗`,coalesce(max((case when (`m`.`KOTEI_SEQ_NBR` = 8) then concat(`n`.`KOTEI_NAME`,' [',if((coalesce(`st`.`KANRYO_FLAG`,0) = 1),'済','未'),']') end)),'-') AS `工程8名・進捗`,coalesce(max((case when (`m`.`KOTEI_SEQ_NBR` = 9) then concat(`n`.`KOTEI_NAME`,' [',if((coalesce(`st`.`KANRYO_FLAG`,0) = 1),'済','未'),']') end)),'-') AS `工程9名・進捗`,coalesce(max((case when (`m`.`KOTEI_SEQ_NBR` = 10) then concat(`n`.`KOTEI_NAME`,' [',if((coalesce(`st`.`KANRYO_FLAG`,0) = 1),'済','未'),']') end)),'-') AS `工程10名・進捗` from ((((((`tbuhink` `t` join `tjuchu` `j` on((`t`.`SEIBAN` = `j`.`TEHAI_KOBAN`))) join `mhinban` `mh` on((`t`.`HINBAN` = `mh`.`HINBAN`))) join `mkoteim` `m` on((`mh`.`KOTEI_PATTERN_NBR` = `m`.`KOTEI_PATTERN_NBR`))) left join `mkoteiname` `n` on((`m`.`KOTEI_CODE` = `n`.`KOTEI_CODE`))) left join (select `thatchum`.`SEIBAN` AS `SEIBAN`,`thatchum`.`HINBAN` AS `HINBAN`,`thatchum`.`KOTEI_CODE` AS `KOTEI_CODE`,max(`thatchum`.`KANRYO_FLAG`) AS `KANRYO_FLAG`,max(`thatchum`.`KAISHI_DATE`) AS `KAISHI_DATE` from `thatchum` group by `thatchum`.`SEIBAN`,`thatchum`.`HINBAN`,`thatchum`.`KOTEI_CODE`) `st` on(((`t`.`SEIBAN` = `st`.`SEIBAN`) and (`t`.`HINBAN` = `st`.`HINBAN`) and (`m`.`KOTEI_CODE` = `st`.`KOTEI_CODE`)))) left join `tbuhinjm` `pl` on(((`t`.`ID` = `pl`.`BUHIN_KOSEI_ID`) and (`m`.`KOTEI_SEQ_NBR` = `pl`.`KOTEI_SEQ_NBR`)))) where (`t`.`PARENT_ID` is null) group by `t`.`HINBAN`,`t`.`SEIBAN`
